findings.message: No README file was found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Add a README with project scope, setup, usage, and reproducibility instructions.
findings.title: README missing

findings.recommendation: Add an OSI-approved license such as MIT, BSD-3-Clause, or Apache-2.0.
findings.title: LICENSE missing

findings.message: No CITATION.cff or citation guidance was found.
findings.recommendation: Add CITATION.cff or a clear citation section in the README.
findings.title: Citation instructions missing

findings.message: No supported dependency manifest was found.
findings.recommendation: Add pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, environment.yml, or another supported manifest.
findings.title: No dependency manifest found

findings.message: No data availability documentation was found.
findings.recommendation: Add DATA.md, docs/data.md, data/README.md, or a README data availability section.
findings.title: Data availability documentation missing

findings.message: No experiment or reproduction entrypoint was detected.
findings.recommendation: Add scripts/reproduce.sh, scripts/run*.sh, a Makefile, or documented train/eval scripts.
findings.title: No experiment entrypoint found

findings.message: No tests directory or test files were detected.
findings.recommendation: Add tests/ or at least one test_*.py / *_test.py file.
findings.title: No tests directory or test files found

evidence.message: Searched pyproject, tox/nox, package scripts, and workflows.

findings.message: No obvious test runner or test command configuration was detected.
findings.recommendation: Document or configure a test runner such as pytest, tox, nox, or package scripts.
findings.title: No test runner/configuration detected

findings.recommendation: Add a GitHub Actions workflow or another CI configuration that runs tests/linting.
findings.title: No CI workflow detected

findings.recommendation: Add entries for .env, caches, raw data, checkpoints, wandb, and mlruns.
findings.title: .gitignore missing common research artifacts

findings.recommendation: Add CHANGELOG.md with at least an initial v0.1.0 entry.
findings.title: CHANGELOG missing

findings.recommendation: Add package version metadata, VERSION file, or release tags.
findings.title: No version metadata found

heuristic_note: Research Repo Doctor uses deterministic heuristics. The score is a guide, not a substitute for peer review or maintainer judgment.
